title: cheirinia × helvetica
side_effects: Cheirinia × helvetica can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, which may cause itching, redness, and swelling of the skin. In more severe cases, it can lead to respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also cause stomach issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Furthermore, improper use of Cheirinia × helvetica may interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse effects on the cardiovascular system and other vital organs.
